messages.content:
1. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
The new musical that has had such bad reviews will ....... at the end of this week.
A	close
B	closed
C	shut
D	shuts
B - closed

2. Identify the meaning of the underlined word or phrase
The trouble is that whenever he's with strangers he always h͟o͟l͟d͟s͟ i͟n his feelings.
A	shows
B	restricts
C	tells
D	allows
B - restricts

3. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
He didn't do well at school and left with few ....... qualifications.
A	academic
B	academy
C	academician
D	academically
A - academic

4. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
Since she was in a hurry, we only managed to ....... a few words.
A	change
B	exchange
C	transmit
D	shift
B - exchange

5. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
The successful candidates will be able to work effectively on ....... .
A	they
B	their
C	their own
D	themselves
C - their own

6. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
The school bus ....... at half past eight.
A	arrives always
B	always arrives
C	arrives alway
D	alway arrives
B - always arrives

7. Identify the meaning of the underlined word or phrase
The speaker illustrated his premise with several a͟n͟e͟c͟d͟o͟t͟e͟s͟.
A	strategies
B	facts
C	personal experiences
D	examples from research

7. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
The administrative supervisor will consider the ....... of his assistant's contract in light of suspicion regarding his loyalty to the company.
A	cancel
B	cancelling
C	cancelled
D	cancellation
D - cancellation

8. Choose the word which is stressed differently from the rest
A	accomplished
B	especially
C	invalid
D	merchandise
D - merchandise

9. Choose the word which has different sound in the part underlined
A	pat͟h
B	toot͟h
C	t͟heme
D	T͟hames
C - th eme (pronounced with the voiced /ð/ sound instead of the voiceless /θ/ sound)

10. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
I never forget the time ....... my motorbike broke down in a very crowded street.
A	where
B	when
C	that
D	in which
B - when

11. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
I'm obviously not getting anywhere with my complaint, please let me talk to someone ....... to you.
A	older
B	above
C	over
D	senior
D - senior

12. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
Good morning Mr. Thomas. What is .......?
A	right
B	left
C	wrong
D	straight
C - wrong

13. Identify the meaning of the word or phrase
n. rate
A	(A) preciseness; exactness
B	(B) graph; diagram
C	(C) organization; custom; convention; law or activity which is accepted in a society
D	(D) price; cost; speed; pace; tax
D - price; cost; speed; pace; tax

14. Choose the word which is stressed differently from the rest
A	adequate
B	infrastructure
C	mutual
D	representation
B - infrastructure

15. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
Save electricity by reducing the number of computers ....... on overnight.
A	that left
B	are left
C	left
D	leaving
B - are left

16. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
The detective story is sometimes called 'whodunit' because the reader has to work ....... who did it, who committed the crime.
A	in
B	out
C	off
D	over
A - in

17. Choose the word which has different sound in the part underlined
A	spe͟ar
B	ge͟ar
C	fe͟ar
D	pe͟ar
D - pe ar (pronounced with the /eə/ diphthong instead of the /ɪə/ diphthong)

18. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
Once you are earning money and you want to keep it safe, you can always ....... an account with a bank.
A	open
B	start
C	begin
D	commence
A - open

19. Identify the meaning of the word or phrase
prep. between
A	(A) under; beneath; underneath
B	(B) up to
C	(C) intermediate to; common; shared
D	(D) but; besides
C - intermediate to; common; shared

20. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
I will have to find a way to ....... myself to the new requirements.
A	match
B	suit
C	accommodate
D	change
C - accommodate

21. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
There's absolutely no way I can ....... you on that matter.
A	meet
B	hold
C	take
D	find
C - take

26. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
Is this ....... for the railway station?
A	correct
B	clear
C	fine
D	right
D - right

28. Choose one correct answer to fill in the blank
I'm really not satisfied with the way you have ....... the situation.
A	dealt
B	handled
C	done
D	fingered
B - handled
